meta.note: Flat catalog keyed by model_name. hash = joaat(model_name). dlc = { id, name, releaseDate }. details = { manufacturer, type, seats, doors, wheels, modKits, weaponized, weapons, features, dimensions, defaultColors, flags }. stats = curated handling values (topSpeed, driveForce, brakeForce, traction, mass, drivetrain, monetaryValue, …).
